title.en: I couldn't care less!진짜 하나도 관심 없어! 알 게 뭐야!
title.ko: 진짜 하나도 관심 없어! 알 게 뭐야!

description.en: When you are completely indifferent to others' opinions or things that don't concern you! Practice expressing a cool attitude with 진짜 하나도 관심 없어 and 알 게 뭐야.
description.ko: 남의 시선이나 나랑 상관없는 일에 완벽하게 무관심할 때! 진짜 하나도 관심 없어와 알 게 뭐야를 사용해 쿨한 태도를 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Indifference. Cool. Confidence. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 방금 뉴스 봤어요? 유명한 연예인 두 명이 사귄다는 기사가 났더라고요!
content.translation: John. did you see the news just now? There was an article about two famous celebrities dating!

content.speaker: John
content.text: I couldn't care less. 진짜 하나도 관심 없어요.
content.translation: I couldn't care less. I don't care at all.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그 사람들이 누굴 만나든 저랑 무슨 상관이에요?
content.translation: What does it matter to me who those people meet?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 존은 사생활에 대해서는 정말 쿨하네요.
content.translation: As expected. you're really cool about private lives. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 저는 궁금해서 계속 찾아보고 있었는데. 존은 정말 알 게 뭐야 라는 표정이네요!
content.translation: I was keep looking it up because I was curious. but you really have an 'I don't care' look!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진짜 하나도 관심 없어. This is a very strong way to show zero interest.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 관심이 조금도 없다는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It means you don't have even a little bit of interest.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 상대방이 나랑 전혀 상관없는 이야기를 할 때 쓸 수 있는 아주 솔직한 리액션이죠.
content.translation: It's a very honest reaction you can use when someone talks about something that has nothing to do with you.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진짜 하나도 관심없어.
content.translation: I don't care at all.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 알 게 뭐야.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이 표현은 "그게 어떻게 되든 내가 알 바 아니다" 라는 뉘앙스를 담고 있어요.
content.translation: This expression carries the nuance of "I don't care what happens with that."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 가끔은 "누가 뭐라고 하든 상관없어" 라는 뜻으로도 쓰이는 아주 시원시원한 표현이에요.
content.translation: It's a very cool expression that is also sometimes used to mean "I don't care what anyone says."

content.speaker: John
content.text: 알 게 뭐야.
content.translation: Who cares.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine someone is telling me that my favorite bakery is changing its interior design.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 소식 들었어요? 존이 자주 가는 그 빵집 말이에요.
content.translation: John. did you hear the news? That bakery you go to often.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 벽지 색깔을 노란색에서 파란색으로 바꾼다고 하더라고요!
content.translation: I heard they're changing the wallpaper color from yellow to blue!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Blue? Yellow? 하나도 상관 안해요.
content.translation: Blue? Yellow? I don't care at all.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 빵만 맛있으면 됐지. 벽지 색깔이 알게 뭐예요.
content.translation: As long as the bread is delicious. who cares about the wallpaper color.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와. 정말 본질에 충실하시네요!
content.translation: Wow. You really stick to the essence!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그래도 가게 분위기가 달라지면 기분도 다르지 않을까요?
content.translation: Still. wouldn't you feel different if the atmosphere of the store changes?

content.speaker: John
content.text: I'm just there for the croissants. Everything else? I couldn't care less!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Focus on what really matters to you and ignore the rest.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 모든 일에 신경을 쓰면 피곤하기만 하잖아요.
content.translation: Right. If you care about everything. it just gets tiring.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 가끔은 오늘 배운 표현들로 불필요한 정보들을 쿨하게 넘겨보세요!
content.translation: Sometimes. try to coolly pass over unnecessary information with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "don't care" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진짜 하나도 관심 없어! I don't care at all!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 하나도 상관 안해! I don't care one bit!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 알 게 뭐야! Who cares!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 나랑 상관없는 일이야! It's none of my business!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 신경 안 써! I don't mind!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 남의 시선이나 불필요한 소문에서 자유로운 쿨한 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a cool day today. free from others' eyes or unnecessary rumors.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 저는 요리에 관심이 정말 많아요. (I have a lot of interest in cooking.)
무관심보다 차라리 미워하는 게 낫다는 말도 있죠. (There's a saying that it's better to hate than to be indifferent.)
유명인들에게도 사생활은 보호받아야 해요. (Even for famous people. their private lives should be protected.)
문제의 본질을 파악하는 것이 중요해요. (It's important to understand the essence of the problem.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be faithful. To be loyal
vocabulary.example: 그는 자신의 일에 아주 충실한 사람이에요. (He is a person who is very faithful to his work.)
남의 말에서 자유로워지는 건 쉽지 않아요. (It's not easy to be free from what others say.)
